query:
SELECT arquivo_id, COUNT(*) as total_itens, SUM(CAST(valor_pago AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_pago, SUM(CAST(valor_glosa AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_glosa, SUM(CAST(valor_informado AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_informado FROM demonstrativo WHERE arquivo_id IN (1020280, 1020281, 1020282, 1020283, 1020284, 1020285) GROUP BY arquivo_id ORDER BY arquivo_id;
SELECT arquivo_id, numero_guia, codigo_item, descricao_item, valor_informado, valor_pago, valor_glosa, codigo_glosa FROM demonstrativo WHERE arquivo_id IN (1020280, 1020281, 1020282, 1020283, 1020284, 1020285) LIMIT 20
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT arquivo_id, COUNT(*) as total_itens, SUM(CAST(valor_pago AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_pago, SUM(CAST(valor_glosa AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_glosa, SUM(CAST(valor_informado AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_informado FROM demonstrativo WHERE arquivo_id IN (1020280, 1020281, 1020282, 1020283, 1020284, 1020285) GROUP BY arquivo_id ORDER BY arquivo_id;
SELECT arquivo_id, numero_guia, codigo_item, descricao_item, valor_informado, valor_pago, valor_glosa, codigo_glosa FROM demonstrativo WHERE arquivo_id IN (1020280, 1020281, 1020282, 1020283, 1020284, 1020285) LIMIT 20
